appraisal_events.evidence: « ...avec ce beau français populaire et pourtant un peu individuel qui était le sien »; elle écarte sa fille pour « surtout gêner Monsieur qui attend de la visite ».
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator stresses the singular quality of Françoise’s speech and values her way of arranging the scene to spare his comfort, which presents her favorably despite the ironic tinge around her domestic stagings.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, Françoise gains in esteem thanks to the explicit praise of her language and to her role of protective management vis‑à‑vis the narrator.
